title: Filter Help - "OR" Criteria
excerpt: I’m looking to find a way to have multiple, “OR”, type logic for board filters. Has anyone figured out a way to do this?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to find a way to have multiple, “OR”, type logic for board filters. Has anyone figured out a way to do this?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JCorrell! Can you let me know a bit why you’d be looking to do this? We don’t have an OR logic as such but I’d like to see if I can help come up with any workarounds.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: Our specific current need is related to a set of boards requiring complex integrations. One of these has been setup completely and is doing exactly what we want. To duplicate the functions and maintain changes on the other boards (which are basically the same but with differing item selections for different work groups) is difficult/painful. I believe that we could eliminate the other boards and focus on maintaining and improving the first one if we could use filters. However, currently, the filters don’t seem to provide even simple “or” and “not” logic. This is what I am looking to overcome.
